title: Standards Manifest (spectrum-systems canonical)
description: Manifest describing contract versions sourced from the spectrum-systems repository.

artifact_type.description: Artifact discriminator for the standards manifest.

standard_source.description: Canonical source repository for this manifest.

standards_version.description: Version tag for the canonical standards bundle.

contract_repository.description: Repository identifier where contracts are governed.

contracts.description: List of artifact types and supported versions.

compatibility_target.description: Downstream or org-level compatibility target for these contracts.

notes.description: Optional additional compatibility or governance notes.
